Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Determining Entittlement To Escheated Property; Agreemeents And Assignments
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John A. Mangini, Esq., of the Law Office of John A. Mangini, Tel. 650.876.0188, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.

No other appearance. The Petitioner provided the court with a copy of its agreement with the heirs. For good cause and to the satisfaction of the court, PETITIONER ESTATE RESEARCH ASSOCIATES, INC.'s Petition For Order Determining Entitlement To Escheated Property and Ordering Payment To Entitled Parties is granted. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
